articles.title: WisdomTree XRP ETF countdown begins as Federal Register publishes filing
articles.description: Today, the Federal Register published WisdomTree's spot XRP ETF, beginning a 21-day public comment period before the SEC review process.The regulator can extend the review by up to 90 days, with the entire process potentially lasting up to 240 days.Under this timeline, a final decision on WisdomTree's proposal could come by October 24.During the public comment period, investors, financial...

articles.title: Animoca Brands joins the MultiversX network, pushes EGLD forward
articles.description: Animoca Brands, a leading branding and investment firm in digital property, is joining the MultiversX ecosystem as a contributor. The … Continue reading The post Animoca Brands joins the MultiversX network, pushes EGLD forward appeared first on Finbold.

articles.title: Could a Cardano ETF Be on the Horizon?
articles.description: Could a Cardano exchange-traded fund (ETF) be emerging on the horizon, potentially providing investors with a new and innovative way to gain exposure to the Cardano cryptocurrency and its underlying blockchain technology?

articles.title: SEC Drops Uniswap Case as Crypto Rules Face Major Shift
articles.description: The SEC ends its investigation into Uniswap, boosting UNI token trading, as CEO Hayden Adams calls for new crypto regulations separate from traditional finance.

articles.title: Bitcoin ETFs suffer record $935 million net outflows as investors turn risk-averse
articles.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs posted around $935 million in net outflows on Tuesday, extending their losses so far this week to approximately $1.5 billion.The massive withdrawal returned during a sharp crypto market sell-off, with investors retreating from risk assets in dealing with growing macroeconomic concerns after President Trump's tariff threats.According to data combined from Farside Investors...
